# [clang]Assertion `Info.Ctx.hasSameUnqualifiedType(BaseIt->getType(), BaseType) && "base class initializers not in expected order` failed

**Author:** Rush10233
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/147126
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash-on-invalid, confirmed, generated by fuzzer
**Closed Date:** 2025-07-08T01:17:02Z

## Body

Probably goes back to clang-6: https://godbolt.org/z/4hW6eTWxb

Generated by fuzzer.

Reduced Test:

```c++
template<int>
struct base
{
      union MyUnion {
          struct NonTrivial {
              NonTrivial() { /* Perform some operation */ }
          } member;
      } u;
  base() = default;
};

struct foo : base<1>, base<2>
{
  constexpr foo() : base<2>{}{}
  constexpr foo(int a) : base<2>{a}{}
};
```

It's interesting that if `constexpr foo()` or `constexpr foo(int a)` is commented out, the assertion won't be triggered until clang-14:  https://godbolt.org/z/1G39fnYMv


Stack Dump:

```
clang++: /root/llvm-project/llvm/tools/clang/lib/AST/ExprConstant.cpp:6815: bool HandleConstructorCall(const clang::Expr*, const {anonymous}::LValue&, {anonymous}::CallRef, const clang::CXXConstructorDecl*, {anonymous}::EvalInfo&, clang::APValue&): Assertion `Info.Ctx.hasSameUnqualifiedType(BaseIt->getType(), BaseType) && "base class initializers not in expected order"' failed.
PLEASE submit a bug report to https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/ and include the crash backtrace, preprocessed source, and associated run script.
```

Reduced Test:

```c++
template&lt;int&gt;
struct base
{
      union MyUnion {
          struct NonTrivial {
              NonTrivial() { /* Perform some operation */ }
          } member;
      } u;
  base() = default;
};

struct foo : base&lt;1&gt;, base&lt;2&gt;
{
  constexpr foo() : base&lt;2&gt;{}{}
  constexpr foo(int a) : base&lt;2&gt;{a}{}
};
```

It's interesting that if `constexpr foo()` or `constexpr foo(int a)` is commented out, the assertion won't be triggered until clang-14:  https://godbolt.org/z/1G39fnYMv
